title: verbascum wraberi
intro: Verbascum wraberi, also known as Wraberi's mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the mullein family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum wraberi include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce coughs, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and sinusitis. The herbal preparations of Verbascum wraberi can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat skin irritations and wounds.
